nameMeanings.name: Dover
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either the port of Dover in Kent, named from the river on which it stands, Celtic dubrās meaning ‘the waters’ (which has become modern Welsh dwfr ‘water’), or Dover in Wigan, Lancashire.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhuidhir or Mac Duibhidhir; see Dwyer .
Americanized form of German   Dauer   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Dwyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Parnell, Liam, Brigid, Cormac, Oonagh, Patrick Michael.

Irish (southern Ireland): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhuidhir, a variant of Ó Duibhidhir (see Diver ), or Mac Duibhidhir ‘descendant of Duibhuidhir’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘dark, black’ + odhar ‘sallow, tawny’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Dover was born in 1390, in England as the daughter of Lloyd Dover. She had at least 1 son with John Wyncoll. She died in 1424, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Dover est née en 1390, à Angleterre, fille de Lloyd Dover. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec John Wyncoll. Elle est décédée en 1424, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Doverは1390年にイギリスでLloyd Doverの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn Wyncollとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1424年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Dover(은)는 1390년 영국에서 Lloyd Dover의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John Wyncoll(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Dover родилась в 1390 г. в местности Англия. Её отца звали Lloyd Dover. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от John Wyncoll. Она умерла в 1424 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
